title: Reo
content:
{{Top|ca|leg|notoc=1}} {{Youmay|the [[Lieutenant Commander/Legends|Lieutenant Commander]]|the [[Reo system/Legends|system]]|}} {{Character |type=GFFA |image= |name=Reo |homeworld= |birth= |death=[[36 ABY]], [[Battle of the Murgo Choke|Murgo Choke]]''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of the ''[[Star Wars: The Dark Nest Trilogy]]'' to between [[35 ABY/Legends|35 ABY]] and [[36 ABY]]. As ''[[Dark Nest II: The Unseen Queen]]'' is stated to take place a [[Standard year/Legends|year]] after the events of ''[[Dark Nest I: The Joiner King]]'', the events of ''Dark Nest II'', which include Reo's [[Death/Legends|death]] at the [[Murgo Choke]], must take place in 36 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|ABY]]. |species= |gender= |pronouns=He/him{{CSWECite|III|93|Reo, Lieutenant Commander}} |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=[[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances]]''[[Dark Nest II: The Unseen Queen]]'' |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|What about Lieutenant Commander Reo?''"
"''Also dead, sir.|Nek Bwua'tu and Yuul during the Battle of the Murgo Choke|audio=Bwuatu-Reo.flac |}} '''Reo''' was a [[Lieutenant Commander/Legends|Lieutenant Commander]] in the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances]]. In [[36 ABY]], he was serving as part of the [[Engineer/Legends|engineering]] staff aboard the [[Victory I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory I''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Admiral Ackbar (Victory-class)|''Admiral Ackbar'']] during the [[Blockade of the Utegetu Nebula|blockade]] of the [[Utegetu Nebula/Legends|Utegetu Nebula]]. When the [[Gorog|Dark Nest]], a secret nest of [[Killik/Legends|Killiks]], [[Battle of the Murgo Choke|attacked]] the [[Starship/Legends|ships]] of the [[Fifth Fleet (Galactic Alliance)|Galactic Alliance Fifth Fleet]], [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Urbok]], who was in charge of damage assessment on the ''Admiral Ackbar'', and Reo were [[Death/Legends|killed]] by Dark Nest [[Assassin/Legends|assassins]]. [[Gotal/Legends|Gotal]] [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Aramb]] was paralyzed by the Killik [[Poison/Legends|venom]], leaving Captain [[Yuul]], field promoted by [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Nek Bwua'tu]], to assume responsibility for the engineering section of the ship. ==Behind the scenes== Reo was first mentioned in the [[2005]] novel ''[[Dark Nest II: The Unseen Queen]]'', part of [[Star Wars: The Dark Nest Trilogy|''The Dark Nest Trilogy'']] written by [[Troy Denning]]. ==Appearances== *''[[Dark Nest II: The Unseen Queen]]'' {{1stm}} *[[Dark Nest II: The Unseen Queen (abridged audiobook)|''Dark Nest II: The Unseen Queen'' abridged audiobook]] {{Mo}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Reo |es=Reo }} [[Category:Engineers]] [[Category:Galactic Alliance Defense Fleet officers]] [[Category:Individuals of unspecified gender]] [[Category:Individuals of unspecified species]] [[Category:Individuals with he/him pronouns]]
